channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19810] llog can overflow due to remaining records
item.description:
it was seen few times already that llog (used by OSP) can hit ENOSPC being actually almost empty.
this happens because we meet still-in-use plain llog in a catalog:

error: header reports 65536 records but 1 were found
Header size : 8192	 llh_size : 64
Time : Wed Jan  7 17:04:37 2026
Number of records: 1	cat_idx: 6070	last_idx: 6070
Flags: 0x412
Target uuid : 
-----------------------
#6071 (064)fid=[0x1:0x3951f2:0x0] path=O/1/d18/3756530

in turn the referenced plain llog is not empty:

error: header reports 65536 records but 12 were found
Header size : 8192	 llh_size : 64
Time : Fri Jan  9 18:08:17 2026
Number of records: 12	cat_idx: 6071	last_idx: 64767
Flags: 0x5
Target uuid : 
-----------------------
#2655 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2a456 target [0x19c00032e0:0x8390ad:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#4413 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2ab17 target [0x19c00032e0:0x876640:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#5282 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2ae6d target [0x19c00032e0:0x8718ac:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#5830 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b080 target [0x19c00032e0:0x8718ab:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#5925 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b0de target [0x19c00032e0:0x876640:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#5927 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b0e0 target [0x19c00032e0:0x8390ad:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#6329 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b269 target [0x19c00032e0:0x8718ac:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#6661 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b3ae target [0x19c00032e0:0x875ad2:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#6851 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b468 target [0x19c00032e0:0x871e3a:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#6970 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b4de target [0x19c00032e0:0x8718ab:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#7555 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b720 target [0x19c00032e0:0x875ad2:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
#7696 (088)setattr64 v2 record id:0xc2b7ac target [0x19c00032e0:0x871e3a:0x0] valid 8000 uid 0:0 gid 0:0 prj 0
item.summary: llog can overflow due to remaining records

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63642
Subject: LU-19810 osp: cancel recs if can't repeat rpc
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 963247e3e0ca038488652aba667b83d934a318d0

I've been running a simple test to reproduce this, using few concurrent chown in a loop - few days, no single problem.

so I guess it's something different, probably OST reporting with transno=0 or LU-15737.

going to add few more counters for corner cases.

I've been thinking about two possible scenarios:

  • llog cancel was missed somehow, probably due to a race
  • llog_process() missed few records
